issue.title: Enhancement: Recovery dialog highlights the parse-failure line (E14)

phases.title: recoveryFlow.ts: pure parseJsonErrorLocation helper + tests
verification: It returns {line, column} for both serde_json ("at line N column M") and V8 ("(line N column M)") messages, and null when no location is present.
`__tests__/recoveryFlow.test.ts` has a parseJsonErrorLocation block covering serde, V8, no-location, and empty-string cases.
`pnpm test` passes including the new cases.
phases.summary: Added pure parseJsonErrorLocation(message) to recoveryFlow.ts — single regex /line N column M/i handles both serde_json and modern V8 JSON.parse messages. 4 new test cases.

phases.title: StateRecoveryDialog: structured error-location callout + line-numbered preview with failing-row highlight & scroll
verification: StateRecoveryDialog imports parseJsonErrorLocation and renders a `.recovery-error-location` callout ("Parse error at line N, column M") in the error summary when the error string carries a location.
handlePreview sets previewErrorLocation from an invalid backup's invalidReason; handleClosePreview clears it.
The preview overlay renders previewContent as line-numbered rows (gutter + text), replacing the bare <pre>.
The row matching previewErrorLocation.line gets an `is-error-line` class and is scrolled into view via a ref callback.

StateRecoveryDialog.css styles `.recovery-error-location`, `.recovery-preview-line`, `.recovery-preview-gutter`, and `.is-error-line` (left accent + tinted background), preserving the preview's monospace + scroll behavior.
Valid-backup previews show line numbers but no highlighted row.
`pnpm build` passes and `pnpm test` is green.
Manual smoke (user): trigger the recovery dialog, preview an invalid backup — the offending line is highlighted and scrolled into view; the error summary shows the structured line/column callout.
phases.summary: StateRecoveryDialog: error summary now shows a structured "Parse error at line N, column M" callout when the state.json error carries a location. The backup preview is rendered as line-numbered rows (gutter + text) instead of a bare <pre>; for invalid backups whose invalidReason carries a location, the offending row gets an is-error-line highlight (left accent + tint) and is scrolled into view via a ref callback. CSS adds .recovery-error-location and the line/gutter/error-line styles. Frontend-only. pnpm build clean, pnpm test green.
